text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 1 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Paris a city burning
Urbanite warfare
With hands and guns

Bloody hell has begun
To the tune of the gun
Killing out on the street
People die on their feet
